citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:50am on 29 April
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on house doors and leaving a message at the phone
number on file. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:50am on 29 April 
2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on house doors and leaving a message at the phone 
number on file. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and 
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
